title: Free No Virus
body:
**NOT ACTUAL PIRATED CONTENT, PLEASE USE AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT LICENSE**

Welcome to FREE NO VIRUS a lightweight survival terror modpack striving for classic graphics and survival focused gameplay.

![Player looks at an iron deposit, a shape looms in the fog.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5155387db7fcd21504ef907a21107bae7ab00fa8.png)

So, any peculiarities with this pack? Yes!

**XP** has been **removed** and replaced with a **new system** entirely

![Player replicates a recipe on their hand to enchant a book.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/820ebfe7448d326a057f67213e457376d882934f.png)
![Player repairs their iron pickaxe in an anvil.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be92c7fb5c9241daf9016c3d9b689a477a27e1bd.png)

You can't access your coordinates with F3, believe me i've tried!

![Players checks the F3 debug menu, it only shows their fps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0399ecdad0ea57c077163731194c3bca9b94c66_0.webp)

Instead use tools like the compass and atlas to keep track of your surroundings.

![Player holds an atlas while looking around.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b62321580f6a4b1a2883cf9f845f9543870d376_0.webp)

Find powerful recipes lost in ancient structures.

![Player finds a Lost Recipe inside a Stronghold Library.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ad92a9fdb1e69ac0acec751469826bed4f3e354.png)

Make use of **new tools** that make your life just a little bit easier

![Player runs through their sack inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ef2fb2bf49bb27ea790a8958a9964dea4f60465_0.webp)

Every morning your days will be counted, **figure out how long you can last!**

![Player looks out the window in day 21.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338cbc75853093f1df42a4611ea5f92ba5a651d0.png)

Just don't venture too far, **who knows if you'll be able to come back...**

![Where are we?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4cb8f84daf0639f17a362dfdbcbe1ab249958f0.png)

So what are you waiting for? **Accept the challenge** and prove you've got what it takes to **survive** in this strange land!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Disclaimer: Possible Flashing Lights.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
